---
title: "Assignment 5A"
author: "Khandker Qaiduzzaman"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Objective

The objective of this assignment is to tidy and transform airline arrival delay data and compare the performance of two airlines using percentage-based analysis both overall and across multiple cities.

# Approach

### Dataset description

For this analysis, I am using airline arrival delay data for two airlines across five destination cities. The dataset contains counts of on-time and delayed flights, organized in a wide format where each city is represented as a separate column. I recreated this dataset in CSV format based on the table provided in the assignment image. This format preserves the original structure while allowing it to be imported into R for tidying and transformation. Below are the column descriptions:

-   Airline: Name of the airline
-   Status: Flight status (on-time or delayed)
-   Cities: Destination cities represented as columns
-   Values: Number of flights for each category

### Anticipated Challenges

The main anticipated challenges include handling missing airline values, converting the dataset from wide to long format, and ensuring accurate percentage calculations for both overall and city-level comparisons. Additionally, interpreting differences between aggregated and city-level results may be challenging and requires careful analysis.

The dataset can be viewed here: <https://raw.githubusercontent.com/NafeesKhandker/Tidying-and-Transforming-Airlines-Data/refs/heads/main/Airlines_data.csv>

### References:
